About this project

An interactive exploration of seven decades of Formula 1 history, built entirely client-side. Every chart and metric is computed live in your browser from the raw Ergast dataset.

Data source

Ergast Motor Racing API via Kaggle — rohanrao/formula-1-world-championship-1950-2020

Technologies

Vanilla JavaScript Chart.js PapaParse HTML5 CSS3
